title: ardisia helferiana
intro: Ardisia helferiana, also known as Himalayan ardisia, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Myrsinaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Ardisia helferiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
